description.pt-BR: Comerciante e marido da Rayy. Fornece a espada inicial.
description.en-US: Rayy's husband and local merchant. He gives you the starting sword.
A reserved mayor and brilliant librarian.

description.pt-BR: Lenhador amigável que fornece madeira e troca itens.
description.en-US: A friendly woodcutter who provides wood and trades items.

description.pt-BR: Ferreiro habilidoso, responsável por armas e itens.
description.en-US: A skilled blacksmith in charge of weapons and gear.

description.pt-BR: Tanuki curioso e tagarela, fã de sementes estranhas. Melhor amigo de Rayy.
description.en-US: A curious and chatty tanuki who loves strange seeds. Rayy's best friend.

description.pt-BR: Grande ouvinte de todos da vila, casada com Marcus.
description.en-US: A great listener for everyone in the village, married to Marcus.

description.pt-BR: Dono do bar local, casado com Selene.
description.en-US: Owner of the local tavern, married to Selene.

description.pt-BR: Garota da cidade fascinada pela vida rural.
description.en-US: A city girl fascinated by rural life.
An upbeat singer with a unique style.

description.pt-BR: Tucano calmo e observador, amigo do Lupi.
description.en-US: A calm and observant toucan, friend of Lupi.
A former warrior obsessed with glory.
